title: Email is auto populated in the form
excerpt: we need an ability to auto populate the email address in the form were a new ticket is created. it does not make sense that a user is connected to the service portal and need to insert his email address in the new ticket…

posts.author: asherbersh (Asher)
posts.cookedHtml:
we need an ability to auto populate the email address in the form were a new ticket is created. it does not make sense that a user is connected to the service portal and need to insert his email address in the new ticket form .
this should be auto populated by the user that have entered the portal and the ticket should be assigned to him .

today i can make a mistake in the mail and then the ticket is lost for the user .
